title: HoneypotEvent
description: Metadata record for a single decoy server connection attempt. Credentials are always masked before storage.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of the connection attempt (ISO 8601).

service.description: Decoy service that received the connection.

source_ip.description: IP address of the connecting client.

source_port.description: Source TCP/UDP port of the connecting client.

username.description: Username submitted in the authentication attempt, if any.

credential_observed.description: Masked representation of the submitted credential. Format: [masked:len=N,hash_prefix=XXXXXXXX]. The raw value is never stored.

method.description: HTTP request method (GET, POST, etc.), if applicable.

user_agent.description: User-Agent header value from the request, if present.

metadata.description: Additional service-specific metadata (e.g., SSH key type, HTTP content-type, FTP command/reply context).
